system.description:
"Was that really there? Or just in your head?"

Class Complexity: ♦♦♦◇

LEVEL 3

Figment. Reaction: when you Defend, you may gain 2 Strain to swap places with an enemy or willing ally within your Psionic Field, making them the new target.

LEVEL 7

Mirage. 1 action. +1 Strain/effect each round.

  • Danger. Create an illusory danger in WIL contiguous spaces. Enemies who enter these spaces take [[/r 1d20]] + LVL psychic damage and must move out of the space before they can take any other action.

LEVEL 11

Mirage (2). Whenever you use Mirage, you may instead choose one of the following:

  • Disguise. Project an illusory image into an enemy's mind (e.g., a wall, pit, or other obstacle or distraction). A lower-level enemy gains your choice of Blinded, Taunted, or Prone. A creature your level or higher can make a WIL save to resist.
  • Distortion. An ally gains your choice of Full Cover, Invisible, or becomes the source of Fear for their enemies.

LEVEL 15

Petrify! Trick a lower-level enemy into thinking they are Petrified. A creature your level or higher must make a WIL save.

Snap out of it! Illusions imposed upon an enemy end when the creature takes any damage.
